Source URL: https://www.sbdc.uh.edu/sbdc/ITC.asp

# SBDC International Trade Center

## Resource type
Export and international trade support.

## Resource summary
Use for new or experienced exporters, export market research, export loan applications, export financing, letters of credit, country/readiness research, documents, Port of Houston/Houston Airport/GHP resource links, and global sales support.

## BOSS routing use
Use this when the user's need matches the topic. Ask enough discovery questions to determine readiness before routing to a specialized program.

## Guardrails
Do not guarantee funding, contracts, certifications, export legality, grant awards, loan approval, or technical feasibility. Route to official advisors and professionals.
